requirement_topic.en: KEGOC / Kazakhstan Grid-Connection Requirements for BESS and PCS
requirement_topic.zh: BESS和PCS的KEGOC / 哈萨克斯坦并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS和PCS的KEGOC / 哈薩克斯坦併網要求

summary.en: BESS projects connecting to Kazakhstan's power system must satisfy the applicable network owner, KEGOC where the National Power Grid or system-operator review is involved, and Kazakhstan electricity-sector rules for the PCS, protection, metering, dispatch communication, power quality, operating modes, and commissioning. Requirements vary by voltage level, connection point, project size, market role, and whether the storage asset is paired with generation or load.
summary.zh: 接入哈萨克斯坦电力系统的BESS项目须满足适用电网业主要求；涉及国家电网或系统运营方审查时，还须满足KEGOC以及哈萨克斯坦电力行业规则对PCS、保护、计量、调度通信、电能质量、运行模式和调试的要求。要求随电压等级、接入点、项目规模、市场角色以及储能是否与发电或负荷配套而变化。
summary.zht: 接入哈薩克斯坦電力系統的BESS項目須滿足適用電網業主要求；涉及國家電網或系統營運方審查時，還須滿足KEGOC以及哈薩克斯坦電力行業規則對PCS、保護、計量、調度通信、電能品質、運行模式和調試的要求。要求隨電壓等級、接入點、項目規模、市場角色以及儲能是否與發電或負荷配套而變化。

standards_or_laws: KEGOC system-operator and National Power Grid connection requirements where applicable
Kazakhstan electricity grid and system-operation rules
Project-specific commissioning and network-owner acceptance requirements

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 34120-2023 for electrochemical storage PCS technical requirements, GB/T 36558-2023 for system-level grid-connected ESS requirements, and State Grid or China Southern Power Grid enterprise rules. These Chinese grid documents do not substitute for Kazakhstan network-owner or KEGOC review.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 34120-2023作为电化学储能PCS技术要求，GB/T 36558-2023作为并网储能系统级要求，并适用国家电网或南方电网企业规则。这些中国并网文件不能替代哈萨克斯坦电网业主或KEGOC审查。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 34120-2023作為電化學儲能PCS技術要求，GB/T 36558-2023作為併網儲能系統級要求，並適用國家電網或南方電網企業規則。這些中國併網文件不能替代哈薩克斯坦電網業主或KEGOC審查。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project rules

gap.en: Chinese PCS type-test reports must be translated into Kazakhstan grid settings and local protection philosophy. Exporters should prepare relay settings, frequency and voltage ride-through data, anti-islanding data, reactive-power and power-factor capability, dispatch communication protocol evidence, metering design, single-line diagrams, model files where requested, and commissioning procedures for the Kazakhstan project owner and network review.
gap.zh: 中国PCS型式试验报告须转换为哈萨克斯坦电网参数和当地保护原则。出口商应准备继电保护定值、频率和电压穿越数据、防孤岛数据、无功和功率因数能力、调度通信协议证据、计量设计、单线图、需要时的模型文件和调试程序，供哈萨克斯坦项目业主及电网审查。
gap.zht: 中國PCS型式試驗報告須轉換為哈薩克斯坦電網參數和當地保護原則。出口商應準備繼電保護定值、頻率和電壓穿越數據、防孤島數據、無功和功率因數能力、調度通信協議證據、計量設計、單線圖、需要時的模型文件和調試程序，供哈薩克斯坦項目業主及電網審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection and energisation where Kazakhstan network-owner, KEGOC, or electricity-sector approval applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid connection where State Grid / Southern Grid project requirements apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 34120 or GB/T 36558 evidence does not itself clear Kazakhstan grid connection. Local network-owner and, where applicable, KEGOC review must be addressed before energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 34120或GB/T 36558证据本身不能完成哈萨克斯坦并网。送电前须处理当地电网业主及适用时KEGOC的审查要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 34120或GB/T 36558證據本身不能完成哈薩克斯坦併網。送電前須處理當地電網業主及適用時KEGOC的審查要求。
